'''vawunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabbie|cabbie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabbie|cabbie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| vawunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:væwinith|væwinith]] || [[word:væwinij|væwinij]] || [[word:væwinish|væwinish]] || [[word:væwini|væwini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vawuwunuth|vawuwunuth]] || [[word:vawuwunuj|vawuwunuj]] || [[word:vawuwunush|vawuwunush]] || [[word:vawuwunu|vawuwunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vawunuth|vawunuth]] || [[word:vawunuj|vawunuj]] || [[word:vawunush|vawunush]] || [[word:vawunu|vawunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vawufnuth|vawufnuth]] || [[word:vawufnuj|vawufnuj]] || [[word:vawufnush|vawufnush]] || [[word:vawufnuf|vawufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vawunuthu|vawunuthu]] || [[word:vawunuju|vawunuju]] || [[word:vawunushu|vawunushu]] || [[word:vawunuku|vawunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vawunuth|vawunuth]] || [[word:vawunuj|vawunuj]] || [[word:vawunush|vawunush]] || [[word:vawunu|vawunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vawunuthul|vawunuthul]] || [[word:vawunujul|vawunujul]] || [[word:vawunushul|vawunushul]] || [[word:vawunukul|vawunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vawunuthuthu|vawunuthuthu]] || [[word:vawunujuju|vawunujuju]] || [[word:vawunushushu|vawunushushu]] || [[word:vawunuku|vawunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vawunuthun|vawunuthun]] || [[word:vawunujun|vawunujun]] || [[word:vawunushun|vawunushun]] || [[word:vawunukun|vawunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vawunuthuoro|vawunuthuoro]] || [[word:vawunujuoro|vawunujuoro]] || [[word:vawunushuoro|vawunushuoro]] || [[word:vawunukuoro|vawunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
